pi_items.source: ActivInspire documentation confirms .flipchart is the standard file extension for Promethean flipchart files
Standard Linux user documents directory path - verified in task setup scripts
Combination of verified directory and filename paths

pi_items.metadata_value: Central box with 4 quadrants labeled Definition, Characteristics, Examples, Non-Examples
pi_items.verified_value: Frayer Model consists of a central concept area with four surrounding quadrants labeled Definition, Characteristics (or features), Examples, and Non-Examples
pi_items.source: Wisconsin Department of Public Instruction (https://dpi.wi.gov) and multiple educational sources (theteachertoolkit.com, ctlonline.org)

pi_items.metadata_value: ATP is a keyword for Mitochondria definition/characteristics
pi_items.verified_value: ATP (Adenosine Triphosphate) is the primary energy molecule produced by mitochondria through cellular respiration

pi_items.metadata_value: energy is a keyword for Mitochondria definition/characteristics
pi_items.verified_value: Mitochondria produces ATP which serves as the energy currency of the cell

pi_items.metadata_value: respiration is a keyword for Mitochondria definition/characteristics
pi_items.verified_value: Cellular respiration (aerobic respiration) occurs in the mitochondrion and produces ATP

pi_items.metadata_value: powerhouse is a keyword for Mitochondria definition/characteristics
pi_items.verified_value: Mitochondria is commonly referred to as the 'powerhouse of the cell' due to its role in ATP production
pi_items.source: Nature Scitable - Mitochondria, Cell Energy, ATP Synthase (https://www.nature.com/scitable/topicpage/mitochondria-14053590/)

pi_items.metadata_value: barrier is a keyword for Cell Membrane definition/characteristics
pi_items.verified_value: The cell membrane functions as a barrier that separates the cell interior from the external environment

pi_items.metadata_value: permeable is a keyword for Cell Membrane definition/characteristics
pi_items.verified_value: The cell membrane is selectively permeable - it allows some molecules to pass while blocking others

pi_items.metadata_value: phospholipid is a keyword for Cell Membrane definition/characteristics
pi_items.verified_value: The cell membrane is primarily composed of a phospholipid bilayer - two layers of phospholipid molecules

pi_items.metadata_value: boundary is a keyword for Cell Membrane definition/characteristics
pi_items.verified_value: The cell membrane acts as a boundary between the cell interior and its external environment
pi_items.source: Oregon State University - The Cell Membrane (https://open.oregonstate.education/anatomy2e/chapter/cell-membrane/)

Frayer model structure: each page requires 1 central box + 4 quadrant boxes = 5 rectangles per page. For 2 pages: 5 × 2 = 10 rectangles. The metadata value of 8 is conservative but verifiable as a minimum threshold allowing partial completion.
Task description explicitly specifies: 'Page 1: Mitochondria' and 'Page 2: Cell Membrane'

pi_items.metadata_value: ActivInspire is the software used for creating flipcharts
pi_items.verified_value: ActivInspire is Promethean's official desktop lesson creation software for creating interactive flipcharts

pi_items.metadata_value: .flipchart is the file extension for ActivInspire flipchart files
pi_items.verified_value: .flipchart files are proprietary binary format files created by ActivInspire containing text, images, multimedia, and lesson metadata

privileged_info_summary: The Frayer Model is a legitimate educational graphic organizer consisting of a central concept with four quadrants labeled Definition, Characteristics, Examples, and Non-Examples. Mitochondria is correctly identified as the site of cellular respiration where ATP is produced as cellular energy, and is commonly called the 'powerhouse of the cell.' The cell membrane is accurately described as a selectively permeable barrier composed of a phospholipid bilayer. ActivInspire is authentic Promethean software that creates .flipchart files. A complete 2-page Frayer model requires approximately 10 rectangles (5 per page: 1 central box + 4 quadrants). All biological terminology and software specifications in the task metadata are scientifically and technically accurate.
